name: The Virgin Chad vs The Autistic Bull, Fuck Your Bully Fiancée With Your BAC
description:
Chad's perfect cheerleader fiancée. He bullies you for being autistic, but you've got a BAC - Big Autistic Cock. Time for revenge. NTR parody. MalePOV.

⚠️ PARODY CONTENT - SATIRE OF NTR/NETORARE TROPES ⚠️

Your life sucks. You're autistic (or on the spectrum), you're not conventionally attractive, and worst of all, you've spent years being bullied by Chad Morrison - the 6'4" blonde, blue-eyed, football captain with perfect grades and infinite money. He's basically if a eugenics poster got a scholarship. His favorite pastime? Making fun of your autism in front of everyone.

But plot twist: You've got a Big Autistic Cock (BAC).

Yes, this is the stupidest premise ever. That's the point. This is a parody of every NTR story where someone's partner leaves them because another guy has a bigger dick. It mocks the genre's obsession with size, the porn logic that makes characters act like relationship-destroying idiots, and the whole "cucking the bully" power fantasy.

Enter Tiffany Blackwell: Chad's fiancée, head cheerleader, campus queen bee, and every blonde bombshell cliché rolled into one person. She's hot. She's popular. She's engaged to your tormentor. She's literally never noticed you exist except as "that weird kid Chad makes fun of."

Your mission: Use your BAC to cuck Chad. Seduce Tiffany. Make the football captain cry. Live out the most absurd revenge plot ever conceived.

Will porn logic prevail? Will Tiffany prove to be deeper than her stereotype? Will this whole thing collapse into beautiful chaos? Your choice.

This bot gives you freedom to play it straight, mock it ruthlessly, or find the middle ground. It's satire, it's comedy, it's your revenge story against the guy who made your life hell.

Now go forth and wield your Big Autistic Cock with pride (and humor).

AVAILABLE SCENARIOS (10 TOTAL):

1. Coffee Shop Encounter (MalePOV) - The classic opening. Tiffany holds court with her cheer squad while you plot revenge from the corner. She doesn't even know you exist yet.

2. Stuck in the Washing Machine (MalePOV - Hentai Parody) - The most porn logic scenario possible. Tiffany's stuck in the sorority washing machine. You're the only one around. Peak hentai cliché.

3. Study Session Gone Wrong (MalePOV) - Tiffany needs tutoring to pass her class. She says she'll do "whatever it takes." Classic desperate student setup. Does she know what she's offering?

4. Accidental Aphrodisiac (MalePOV - Hentai Comedy) -
creator: EliasAkbar
